scripts.lint: echo "lint pipeline will be wired in phase 1"
scripts.format:check: echo "format check pipeline will be wired in phase 1"
scripts.typecheck: echo "typecheck pipeline will be wired in phase 1"
scripts.test: echo "test pipeline will be wired in phase 1"
scripts.security:deps: echo "dependency audit pipeline will be wired in phase 1"
scripts.ci:light: npm run lint && npm run format:check
scripts.ci:extended: npm run ci:light && npm run typecheck && npm run test
scripts.ci:full: npm run ci:extended && npm run security:deps
